title: Zooming Web Pages
drDigitalIntro: Some websites are hard to read if the text is tiny. You can zoom in with Command+Plus or zoom out with Command+Minus. You can also pinch on the trackpad to zoom. Press Command+0 to return to normal size. Each website remembers your zoom level — when you return, it's zoomed how you like it. This makes browsing more comfortable, especially if you have trouble reading small text.
drDigitalSuccess: You can make any website easier to read!
drDigitalHint: Zoom is your friend — adjust it to what's comfortable for your eyes.
